github._comment: GitHub API via the official GitHub MCP server. The bridge maps GITHUB_TOKEN to GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN and can fall back to local gh auth.

gh._comment: GitHub CLI MCP wrapper. Uses local gh plus bridge-provided GH_TOKEN when available.

agent-orchestrator._comment: Local dogfood instance of this package. Prerequisite: pnpm build so dist/cli.js exists. Worker CLIs and their auth stay host-local.
